text.title: TTS Basics — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end synthesize() call for a news headline payload: cache miss path on first call, cache hit on the second identical call, both returning the canonical output contract.

section.title: Worked synthesis — news headline, voice=onyx, provider=openai
Expected outputs
section.p: First call returns cached=false with a duration ~2.3s. Second call returns cached=true with the same path, same cache_key, same duration. Both pass the validate-tts-basics.py schema check.
